evals.prompt: Deploy my wiki to GitHub Pages — repo is me/my-notes with wiki.yaml at the root
evals.expected_output: Workflow with --site-base-url /my-notes, artifact path _site/my-notes, Pages Actions source reminder.
expectations: Aligns site-base-url with /my-notes or equivalent project-site path
Sets upload-pages-artifact path to _site/my-notes or explains artifact path rule
Mentions GitHub Pages Build and deployment GitHub Actions setting
Does not run wiki init or suggest scaffolding
Does not suggest peaceiris or deploy from a branch

evals.prompt: Set up CI to publish docs/wiki.yaml to GitHub Pages at /wiki
expectations: Uses -c docs/wiki.yaml or equivalent config path
Includes check and build steps before deploy-pages
References deploy-pages.yml shape or upload-pages-artifact plus deploy-pages

evals.prompt: Publish wiki to GitHub Pages but wiki is not installed
evals.expected_output: States CLI required, stops without creating workflow.
expectations: States Wiki CLI on PATH is required
Does not create workflow file when CLI is missing
Does not mention wiki-install skill path by name

evals.prompt: Deploy nancy-kataria/wiki to GitHub Pages — wiki.yaml at repo root, site.base_url is /wiki
evals.expected_output: Pip template, artifact _site/wiki, no uv sync, no committing _site.
expectations: Uses pip install wazootech-wiki or pip template not uv sync without pyproject
Does not commit _site to main or suggest deploy from a branch
Does not use peaceiris or publish_dir ./_site
